document.title: FCC Partial Test Report
standards: FCC KDB 558074 D01 DTS Meas Guidance v04
FCC KDB 662911 D01 Multiple Transmitter Output v02r01

sourceSummary.oneLine: FCC partial test report FR740701-02AC Rev. 01 for Laird Technologies ST60-2230C-P / SU60-2230C-P WLAN and Bluetooth module under 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides FCC radiated emission and unwanted emission test evidence for the listed 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
keyPoints: The report declares the tested sample evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the listed standards.
Summary of test results reports Radiated Emissions under FCC Rules 15.247(d) and 15.209 as Pass.
The EUT uses DC 3.3V from host and supports 2400-2483.5 MHz WLAN operation.
The test laboratory is International Certification Corp.; FCC Designation No. TW0009 and FCC site registration No. 207696 are listed.

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

evidence.claim: Report FR740701-02AC is an FCC Partial Test Report with version Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: FR740701-02AC Page : 1 of 37 Report Version: Rev. 01 FCC Partial Test Report

evidence.claim: The report was initially issued on Nov. 29, 2017.
evidence.evidenceText: Release Record Report No. Version Description Issued Date FR740701-02AC Rev. 01 Initial issue Nov. 29, 2017

evidence.claim: The equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
The FCC ID for the device is SQG-60SIPT.
The listed EUT models are ST60-2230C-P and SU60-2230C-P.
evidence.evidenceText: The following models are provided to this EUT. Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description Laird Technologies ST60-2230C-P 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module For marketing purpose SU60-2230C-P

evidence.claim: The applicable standard on the report cover is 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247.
The EUT must comply with 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247, ANSI C63.10-2013, FCC KDB 558074 D01 DTS Meas Guidance v04, and FCC KDB 662911 D01 Multiple Transmitter Output v02r01.
evidence.evidenceText: According to the specification of EUT, the EUT must comply with following standards and KDB documents. 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247 ANSI C63.10-2013 FCC KDB 558074 D01 DTS Meas Guidance v04 FCC KDB 662911 D01 Multiple Transmitter Output v02r01

evidence.claim: The summary result for radiated emissions under FCC Rules 15.247(d) and 15.209 is Pass.
evidence.evidenceText: Summary of Test Results FCC Rules Test Items Measured Result 15.247(d) 15.209 Radiated Emissions [dBuV/m at 3m]: 812.83MHz 44.78 (Margin -1.22dB) - QP Pass

evidence.claim: The tested WLAN frequency range is 2400-2483.5 MHz.
evidence.evidenceText: RF General Information Frequency Range (MHz) ... 2400-2483.5 b ... 2400-2483.5 g ... 2400-2483.5 n (HT20) ... 2400-2483.5 n (HT40)

evidence.claim: The EUT power supply type is DC 3.3V from host.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Supply Type DC 3.3V from host

evidence.claim: Radiated emissions testing used test site 03CH03-WS with ambient condition 22-24°C / 66-67% and tester Aska Huang.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Item Test Site Ambient Condition Tested By Radiated Emissions 03CH03-WS 22-24°C / 66-67% Aska Huang

evidence.claim: The test site lists FCC Designation No. TW0009 and FCC site registration No. 207696.
